title: Sports and Entertainment in English-Speaking Countries

tasks.instruction: Wybierz poprawna odpowiedz A, B, C lub D.

items.question: Which sport is the most popular in the United States and has the Super Bowl as its biggest event?
The Wimbledon tournament, held every year in London, is associated with which sport?
Which band from Liverpool became one of the most famous music groups in history?
What is the national sport of New Zealand, played by the famous All Blacks team?
Hollywood, the centre of the American film industry, is located in _______.
Which sport do you associate with the NBA (National Basketball Association)?
Cricket is especially popular in England, Australia, and _______.
What is the name of the famous animation studio that created 'Toy Story' and 'Finding Nemo'?
Which traditional dance do the New Zealand All Blacks perform before rugby matches?
The Premier League is the top football league in _______.
